---
name: Feature request / proposal
about: Suggest an option, hook, or behavior change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!-- A concrete situation where the module didn't do what you needed.
     A real site, a real sheet, a real outcome. Not "it would be nice
     if…" — what got in your way? -->

## What you'd want instead

<!-- The behavior change. A new option, a different default, a new
     `data-*` template attribute, a hook, an event. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you work around it in user-land? Is there an existing option
     or hook (`transformRow`, `onError`, the consent adapter) that
     almost does it? -->

## Scope check

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md for what fits. New top-level options on the
     `gSheets()` call, new `data-*` template attributes, and any change
     that widens the contract are discussed before any PR. The binding
     model is kept in lockstep with @copperdesign/gcal — divergence
     needs a strong reason. -->
